name: trusted-dns-worker
description: Trusted-DNS Cloudflare Worker - Secure DNS relay with DoH upstream
author: neon9809

ROOT_SEED.description: Shared secret between Worker and Docker node. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`. Must be a 64-character hex string.

DOH_UPSTREAMS.description: JSON array of DoH upstream resolver URLs. Default: Google + Cloudflare.

DOH_TIMEOUT_MS.description: DNS upstream timeout in milliseconds. Default: 5000.

CLIENT_REGISTRY.description: Optional JSON array string for multi-client routing. Each entry provides a root_seed and optional per-client upstream settings.
